title: LumosCraft PACK
description: The most optimized modpack that uses the LumosCraft server
body:
# LumosCraft PACK Welcome to **LumosCraft PACK**, the official client-side modpack tailored for players of the LumosCraft server. This pack focuses on delivering a clean, smooth Minecraft experience while adding a few essential features that enhance communication and expression in multiplayer. ## 🧩 What’s Inside? - 🎙️ **Plasmo Voice** – Proximity voice chat for more immersive interactions - 💃 **EmoteCraft** – Express yourself with in-game emotes - ⚙️ Performance-focused configuration for stability and responsiveness - ✅ Lightweight and easy to run, even on lower-end setups ## 🌐 Server Integration This modpack is designed to work seamlessly with the **LumosCraft** server, ensuring compatibility and improving the social experience without modifying core gameplay. ## 🚀 Why Use It? If you're playing on LumosCraft, this pack provides everything you need to connect, communicate, and play with others — all while keeping the game fast and responsive. ---

Simple. Functional. Optimized for LumosCraft.
